What entities are present and what are they doing?
canonical_answer: Triangular slices of golden-brown fried bread rest on a white rectangular plate featuring a ribbed texture. A creamy white sauce covers the bread, garnished with slivered almonds, chopped green pistachios, and scattered pink rose petals. A whole deep pink rose stands in the background beside a small beige ceramic bowl on a light wooden serving board.

question: Describe what is happening
canonical_answer: A hand with fair skin holds a golden spoon with a metallic finish over the white rectangular plate. The spoon lifts a portion of the bread dessert soaked in creamy sauce. A blue square graphic overlay displays the text Double Ka Meetha and my tasty curry. The plate sits on a light wooden board next to a whole pink rose.

question: What will the person do next? A. Pour additional creamy sauce from the small bowl. B. Scoop a portion of the dessert with the spoon. C. Place more rose petals on the bread slices. D. Move the wooden board out of the frame.

What is about to happen? A. A hand will reach in with a spoon to serve the dish. B. The blue text overlay will change to red. C. The camera will pan to show the cooking process. D. The rose flower will be placed on top of the bread.
